explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: An ESG report describes operational audits and due diligence for third parties. The report also describes policy requirements for suppliers regarding misconduct investigation.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Otis Connect & Thrive 2024 ESG Report" provides evidence for **external accountability, governance, and oversight**. The report details operational audits and due diligence for third parties, as well as policy requirements for suppliers regarding misconduct investigation, demonstrating mechanisms for external accountability and governance. Furthermore, it describes senior management monitoring, operational investigation processes, and reporting mechanisms for concerns, which support the oversight and governance pillars.
relevant_sources.title: Otis Connect & Thrive 2024 ESG Report

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A privacy policy states commitments against using personal data in automated decision-making or for undisclosed purposes. An ESG report describes operational audits and due diligence for third parties, along with policy requirements for suppliers regarding misconduct investigation. The report also describes senior management monitoring, operational investigation processes, and reporting mechanisms for concerns.

relevant_sources.summary: The Otis Worldwide Privacy Policy supports the **governance** and **privacy** pillars by stating commitments against using personal data in automated decision-making or for undisclosed purposes. This policy document also describes security and access controls for IT systems, which implies data protection measures related to system access, further reinforcing its support for the privacy pillar.
relevant_sources.title: Otis Worldwide Privacy Policy

transparency.findings: A product page describes the AI/ML algorithms used in the Otis Compass Infinity AI Elevator Dispatching system. It outlines how these algorithms are trained with traffic data and continuously collect and use data to predict patterns and tune parameters without human intervention.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Otis Compass Infinity AI Elevator Dispatching Product Page" provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar. This product page supports transparency by describing the AI/ML algorithms used, how they are trained with months of traffic data, and how the system continuously collects and uses data to predict traffic patterns and tune parameters without human intervention.
relevant_sources.title: Otis Compass Infinity AI Elevator Dispatching Product Page

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 6 publicly available sources, Otis Worldwide's published materials address 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Product pages describe the AI/ML algorithms used in the Otis Compass Infinity AI Elevator Dispatching system and how they are trained with months of traffic data, while an ESG report details senior management monitoring and operational investigation processes for oversight. A privacy policy states commitments against using personal data in automated decision-making and for undisclosed purposes, addressing both governance and privacy, while external accountability is documented through descriptions of operational audits and due diligence for third parties in an ESG report. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness or explainability.
